channel.title: TTC Service Alerts
channel.description: Live service alerts for the Toronto Transit Commission

item.title: 🚇 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: There is no subway service between Kipling and Jane stations due to planned signal work. Shuttle buses are running.
item.description: https://files.ttc.ca/public-images/public-image-639101814534147095.png

item.title: 🚇 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: On Sunday, March 29, there will be no subway service between Jane and Ossington stations, due to planned signal work. Shuttle buses will operate. Regular subway service will resume Monday, March 30 at 6:00 a.m.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: On Sunday, March 29, there will be no subway service between Jane and Ossington stations, due to planned signal work. Shuttle buses will operate. Regular subway service will resume Monday, March 30 at 6:00 a.m.

item.title: 🚇 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: On Saturday, March 28, there will be no subway service between Kipling and Jane stations, due to planned signal work. Shuttle buses will operate.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: On Saturday, March 28, there will be no subway service between Kipling and Jane stations, due to planned signal work. Shuttle buses will operate.

item.title: 🚌 26 Dupont: Detour via Runnymede Station due to a planned subway closure.
item.description: Buses are diverting to Runnymede Station due to a planned subway closure.

item.title: 🚌 27 Jane South: Detour via Old Mill Station due to a planned subway closure.
item.description: Buses are diverting to Old Mill Station due to a planned subway closure.

item.title: 🚌 35 Jane: Detour via Old Mill Station due to a planned subway closure.
item.description: Buses are diverting to Old Mill Station due to a planned subway closure.

item.title: 🚌 55 Warren Park: Detour via Runnymede Station due to a planned subway closure.
item.description: Buses are diverting to Runnymede Station due to a planned subway closure.

item.title: 🚌 149 Etobicoke-Bloor: Detour via Runnymede Station due to a planned subway closure.
item.description: Buses are diverting to Runnymede Station due to a planned subway closure.

item.title: 🚌 935 Jane Express: Detour via Old Mill Station due to a planned subway closure.
item.description: Buses are diverting to Old Mills Station due to a planned subway closure.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Sheppard-Yonge to York Mills stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Sheppard-Yonge to York Mills stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Eglinton to Davisville stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Eglinton to Davisville stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Dupont to St Clair West stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Dupont to St Clair West stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Wilson to Sheppard West stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Wilson to Sheppard West stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Wilson to Yorkdale stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Wilson to Yorkdale stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from St Clair West to Dupont stations while we work on switch issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from St Clair West to Dupont stations while we work on switch issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Bloor-Yonge to Rosedale stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Bloor-Yonge to Rosedale stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from North York Centre to Finch stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from North York Centre to Finch stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual westbound from Warden to Victoria Park stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual westbound from Warden to Victoria Park stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual westbound from Warden to Victoria Park stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual westbound from Warden to Victoria Park stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Kipling to Islington stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Kipling to Islington stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Keele to Dundas West stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Keele to Dundas West stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Sherbourne to Castle Frank stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Sherbourne to Castle Frank stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: ♿ Dundas West: Escalator 8B1E out of service from Line 2 Kipling platform to concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 29, 2026.
item.description: Dundas West: Escalator 8B1E out of service from Line 2 Kipling platform to concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 29, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Coxwell: Escalator 11D1E out of service from concourse to Strathmore Blvd entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.
item.description: Coxwell: Escalator 11D1E out of service from concourse to Strathmore Blvd entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Finch: Escalator 22Y11E out of service from Fares concourse to GO and YRT bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service April 30, 2026.
item.description: Finch: Escalator 22Y11E out of service from Fares concourse to GO and YRT bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service April 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Finch: Escalator 22Y10E out of service from GO and YRT bus platform to Fares concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service April 30, 2026.
item.description: Finch: Escalator 22Y10E out of service from GO and YRT bus platform to Fares concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service April 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Spadina: Escalator 1S5E out of service from Line 1 Finch via Union platform to south concourse due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service July 31, 2026.
item.description: Spadina: Escalator 1S5E out of service from Line 1 Finch via Union platform to south concourse due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service July 31, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Museum: Escalator 2Y1E out of service from concourse to Line 1 platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service July 31, 2026.
item.description: Museum: Escalator 2Y1E out of service from concourse to Line 1 platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service July 31, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Finch: Escalator 22Y9E out of service from bus concourse to bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service April 3, 2026.
item.description: Finch: Escalator 22Y9E out of service from bus concourse to bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service April 3, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Finch: Escalator 22Y8E out of service from bus concourse to bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service April 3, 2026.
item.description: Finch: Escalator 22Y8E out of service from bus concourse to bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service April 3, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Finch: Elevator 22Y3L out of service between bus platform and bus concourse while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service April 10, 2026.
item.description: Finch: Elevator 22Y3L out of service between bus platform and bus concourse while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service April 10, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Dupont: Escalator 2S8E out of service from concourse to Dupont St north side entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 1, 2026.
item.description: Dupont: Escalator 2S8E out of service from concourse to Dupont St north side entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 1, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Dupont: Escalator 2S7E out of service from Dupont St north side entrance to concourse due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 1, 2026.
item.description: Dupont: Escalator 2S7E out of service from Dupont St north side entrance to concourse due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 1, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Yorkdale: Escalator 7S4E out of service from Line 1 Centre platform to Yorkdale Service Rd entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.
item.description: Yorkdale: Escalator 7S4E out of service from Line 1 Centre platform to Yorkdale Service Rd entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ North York Centre: Escalator 23Y3E out of service from Line 1 Vaughan via Union platform to concourse due to a technical problem. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 31, 2026.
item.description: North York Centre: Escalator 23Y3E out of service from Line 1 Vaughan via Union platform to concourse due to a technical problem. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 31, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Avenue: Elevator 2 out of service between Eglinton Avenue north side, west entrance and concourse due to a technical problem.
item.description: Avenue: Elevator 2 out of service between Eglinton Avenue north side, west entrance and concourse due to a technical problem.

item.title: ♿ Cedarvale: Elevator out of service between upper concourse, lower concourse, Line 1 southbound, and Line 5 centre platform while the maintainer performs maintenance.
item.description: Cedarvale: Elevator out of service between upper concourse, lower concourse, Line 1 southbound, and Line 5 centre platform while the maintainer performs maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Broadview: Escalator 6D3E out of service from concourse to Broadview Ave entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 29, 2026.
item.description: Broadview: Escalator 6D3E out of service from concourse to Broadview Ave entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 29, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Eglinton: Elevator 3 out of service between Line 1 centre platform and Line 5 centre platform while we perform maintenance.
item.description: Eglinton: Elevator 3 out of service between Line 1 centre platform and Line 5 centre platform while we perform maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Mount Dennis: Elevator 2 out of service between bus platform and concourse while we perform maintenance.
item.description: Mount Dennis: Elevator 2 out of service between bus platform and concourse while we perform maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Kipling: Escalator 16B1E out of service from Line 2 platform to bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service July 11, 2026.
item.description: Kipling: Escalator 16B1E out of service from Line 2 platform to bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service July 11, 2026.

item.title: ♿ St Clair: Elevator 16Y2L out of service between concourse and Line 1 northbound platform due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.
item.description: St Clair: Elevator 16Y2L out of service between concourse and Line 1 northbound platform due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Warden: Elevator 15D2L out of service between concourse and Warden Avenue entrance due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.
item.description: Warden: Elevator 15D2L out of service between concourse and Warden Avenue entrance due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Warden: Elevator 15D1L out of service between concourse and Line 2 platform due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.
item.description: Warden: Elevator 15D1L out of service between concourse and Line 2 platform due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Sheppard-Yonge: Elevator out of service between Sheppard Ave E south side entrance and Line 4 eastbound platform while we perform maintenance.
item.description: Sheppard-Yonge: Elevator out of service between Sheppard Ave E south side entrance and Line 4 eastbound platform while we perform maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Sheppard-Yonge: Elevator out of service between Yonge St east side entrance and north concourse while we perform maintenance.
item.description: Sheppard-Yonge: Elevator out of service between Yonge St east side entrance and north concourse while we perform maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Don Valley: Elevator 2 out of service between concourse and Don Mills Road east side entrance and bus terminal due to the Ontario Line construction.
item.description: Don Valley: Elevator 2 out of service between concourse and Don Mills Road east side entrance and bus terminal due to the Ontario Line construction.

item.title: ♿ Islington: Escalator 15B5E out of service from concourse to Islington Ave east side entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service December 22, 2026.
item.description: Islington: Escalator 15B5E out of service from concourse to Islington Ave east side entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service December 22, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Spadina: Escalator 2B2E out of service from Line 2 Kennedy platform to south concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 6, 2026.
item.description: Spadina: Escalator 2B2E out of service from Line 2 Kennedy platform to south concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 6, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Victoria Park: Elevator 14D1L out of service between overpass, Victoria Park Ave entrance and concourse while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service May 29, 2026.
item.description: Victoria Park: Elevator 14D1L out of service between overpass, Victoria Park Ave entrance and concourse while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service May 29, 2026.
